# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

```yml
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  host: '*'
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector: ''
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-external.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-control-plane
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-control-plane.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-identity.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-admin
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-admin.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-grpc
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-grpc.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity-mtls
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-identity-mtls.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1

  name: linkerd-admin-mtls

  hosts:

    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-admin-mtls-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-grpc-mtls-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-grpc-mtls-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external-external.linkerd.svc.cluster.local'

    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
